choose_request_path: Choose the  path you want to start with.
add_profile_country_for_agents: Add your country of residence in your profile to see matching agents.
no_matched_agents: No matched agents right now. You can still send the request.
preferred_agent_hint: This only sets a preference. Routing will still be validated.
selected_agent_recheck: Selected agent will be rechecked when the route is complete.
selected_agent_validation_pending: Selected agent will be validated during routing.
